reminder_hint: Kalmar da aka ajiye (tare da ma'ana da misali) tana fitowa don bita. Ana buƙatar shiga.
pron_hint: Saurari wannan layi da sauri daban-daban — muryar neural ta halitta.
pron_open_tip: Yi aiki da lafazin subtitle na yanzu (P)
pron_empty: Babu layin subtitle tukuna — kunna bidiyon.
chat_speak_tip: Ji subtitle (ko rubutunka) a hankali, muryar halitta
login_open_browser: Ana buɗe mai bincike don shiga da Google...
login_cancelled: An soke shiga ko ya ƙare. Gwada sake.
details_failed: Ba a iya ɗaukar cikakkun bayanai ba.
yg_tip: Ji lafazin sa a mahallin akan YouGlish
sub_add_tip: Ɗauki fayil ɗin subtitle, ko ja .srt akan bidiyon
sub_need_first: Buɗe bidiyo da farko, sannan ɗauki subtitle ɗinsa
loop_need_sub: Ɗauki subtitle (.srt) don amfani da maimaita zagaye
loop_no_line: Babu layi akan allo — kunna maimaita zagaye yayin subtitle
autopause_on: Dakata kai tsaye kowane layi: a kunne
loop_mark_a: Alamar A da farko (kuma B dole ya kasance bayan A)
focus_mode_tip: Karatu mai da hankali: dakata kai tsaye + maimaita jumla
auto_ex_tip: A haɗa motsa jiki cikin fim ɗin yayin da yake kunna
auto_ex_starting: Lokaci ya yi na motsa jiki…
track_no_sub: Ka loda fassarar rubutu da farko
lesson_click_hint: Danna wata hanya don fara darasarta mai jagora
slow_voice_on: Yanayin jinkiri: muryar neural ta halitta
slow_voice_off: An mayar da sauti na asali
stt_tip: Ƙirƙiri rubutu daga magana ta atomatik
stt_unavailable: Rubutu ta atomatik baya samuwa a wannan ginin (samfurin magana ya ɓace).
exercise_tip: Motsa jiki na fahimta ta AI (J)
fluency_tip: Fassara rukunin rubutu cikin harshenka da fasaha (U)
fluency_instruction: Karanta waɗannan layukan ka rubuta mafi kyawun fassarar gaba ɗaya cikin harshenka.
fluency_next_tip: Ɗauki rukunin rubutu a kusa da lokacin yanzu
fluency_no_subs: Babu rubutu a kusa da wannan wuri tukuna.
paraphrase_tip: Sake rubuta layin yanzu da wasu kalmomi, harshe ɗaya (Y)
paraphrase_instruction: Sake rubuta layin da aka haskaka ta wata hanya, a cikin harshe ɗaya, kiyaye ma'anarsa da dacewa da yanayin.
describe_scene_tip: Bayyana yanayin a cikin harshen da kake koyo — yanayin yana maimaitawa (D)
describe_take_tip: Bayyana hoto ɗaya a cikin harshen da kake koyo — fim ɗin yana tsayawa (T)
describe_scene_instruction: Kalli yanayin mai maimaitawa ka bayyana abin da ke faruwa, a cikin harshen da kake koyo. Yi amfani da layukan da ke ƙasa a matsayin mahallin.
describe_take_instruction: Fim ɗin ya tsaya. Bayyana wannan hoto — abin da kake gani — a cikin harshen da kake koyo. Yi amfani da layukan da ke ƙasa a matsayin mahallin.
dialogue_tip: Yi wasan kwaikwayo na tattaunawa — kai kaɗai ke magana da hali, fim ɗin yana jiranka (I)
dialogue_echo_hint: Fim ɗin yana kunna layi, sannan ya rage ƙarfi ya maimaita shi — ka faɗa shi a kan (shadowing), sannan Ci gaba.
dialogue_no_dialogue: Babu tattaunawa a kusa da wannan wuri.
lang_topup_ready: Sabbin fassarori sun shirya — sake kunna don amfani da su.
listening_tip: Yanayin sauraro: ɓoye rubutu + AI yana tambayar tambayoyin fahimta (G)
listening_on: Yanayin sauraro: ɓoye rubutu + tambayoyin AI
listening_paused: An tsaya — AI yana da tambaya a gare ka.
listening_fallback_q: Me aka faɗa yanzu? Amsa a cikin tattaunawa, sannan ka rubuta 'ci gaba'.
listening_resumed: Ana ci gaba da fim ɗin.
sub_hidden: Rubutu ya ɓoye (matsa linzamin kwamfuta zuwa ƙasa don gani)
videos_hint: Kalmomin da ka ajiye da + a cikin rubutun mai kunnawa. Danna kalma don tsallake zuwa fim ɗin da ta fito; yi amfani da maɓallin taɗi don tambayar AI. Danna dama don cikakkun bayanai, ƙara zuwa ƙamus na ko cire.
videos_empty: Babu kalmomi tukuna. Danna + akan rubutu yayin kallon bidiyo.
videos_no_match: Babu kalmomin da suka dace da bincikenka.
videos_no_source: Wannan kalma ba ta da fim ɗin asali da aka ajiye.
vision_key_help: Don tantance 'kwatanta yanayin/dauki' tare da AI yana GANIN hoton, liƙa maɓallin OpenRouter kyauta. Ɗaya kyauta ne (ba katin) kuma samfuran gani da aka yi amfani da su suna da $0.
vision_key_set: Matsayi: an saita maɓalli — nazarin hoto yana kunne.
vision_key_unset: Matsayi: babu maɓalli tukuna — aikin tantancewa yana aiki da rubutu kawai.
vision_key_prompt: Liƙa maɓallin OpenRouter (bar shi fanko don cire):
vision_key_saved: An ajiye maɓalli — an kunna nazarin hoto
need_login_vocab: Shiga don ƙara zuwa babban ƙamus ɗinka.
add_word_personalise_tip: Ƙara fassarar ka da bayanin kanka kafin ajiyewa zuwa asusun yanar gizonka
add_word_hint: Keɓance ta yadda kake so — an ajiye ta zuwa asusun Lexio na yanar gizonka.
add_word_translation_ph: bar fanko don AI ta cika
add_word_note_ph: dalilin da ya sa take da muhimmanci a gareka, abin tunawa…
add_word_synced: An shiga — wannan yana ajiyewa zuwa asusun yanar gizonka.
add_word_local_only: Ba a shiga ba — shiga don ta isa asusun yanar gizonka.
lang_failed: An kasa fassara mu'amalar. Gwada daga baya.
lang_restart_body: Sake kunna mai kunnawa yanzu don amfani da {lang}?
chat_welcome:
Tambaya game da bidiyo

Misali: "Bayyana wannan ra'ayi"
"Fassara wannan ɓangaren"
greet_user: Sannu {name}! Na san bidiyoyinka da kalmomin da ka ajiye — tambaye ni komai.
prac_loop_b_tip: Alamar ƙarshen madauki kuma kunna (da hannu)
prac_loop_tip: Madauki na layin na yanzu / kashe (L)
prac_autopause_tip: Dakata a ƙarshen kowane layi — inuwa (X)
loop_a_marked: An saita A a {t} — yanzu alama B
subs_hidden: Rubutu ya ɓoye (matsa linzamin kwamfuta zuwa ƙasa don leƙawa)
ph_hint:
Lexio Study Player

Ctrl+O  buɗe
Space  kunna/tsaya
sub_online_tip: Bincika OpenSubtitles don neman rubutun wannan bidiyo
subsearch_none: Ba a sami rubutu ba — gwada take mai sauƙi.
subsearch_fail: Bincike ya gaza. Duba haɗin kai ka sake gwadawa.
subsearch_dl_fail: Ba a iya sauke wannan rubutun ba. Gwada wani.
subsearch_hint: Danna sau biyu kan sakamako don saukewa da loda shi.
sub_menu_tip: Danna dama: rubutu biyu/uku da fassara ta atomatik
sub_mgr_btn_tip: Sarrafa rubutun — zaka iya nuna har 3 a lokaci guda (asali + fassarori)
sub_mgr_intro: Nuna har rubutu 3 a jere akan bidiyo a lokaci guda. Babban shine abin da kake koya; sauran fassara/taimako ne.
sub_mgr_autotr: Ko fassara layi na 2 zuwa {lang} ta atomatik da AI
sub_mgr_note: Layi na 2/3 don karantawa kawai — ba sa canza katin kalmomi (waɗannan suna cikin harshen asali).
subs_feed_empty: Loda rubutu don ganin layukan nan — tare da kalmomin mahimmanci da aka ja layi kuma ana iya dannawa.
subs_feed_hint: Yana bin bidiyo. Danna kalma don cikakkun bayanai; danna lokaci don tsalle can.
